page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs using an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance does not utilize hyperthreading, allocating exactly one thread per physical core to ensure dedicated compute performance.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the server includes a bundled 7679 GB SSD, offering substantial capacity for data-intensive operations. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. No GPU accelerators are present on this instance.

Given the high local SSD capacity and dedicated CPU cores, this instance delivers a high-density storage profile suitable for workloads requiring low-latency local data access. It is designed for database hosting, large-scale transactional processing, and storage-heavy applications where network-attached storage latency would limit performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.8xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.7 GHz, with a strict 1.0 thread-per-core allocation. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core, alongside a massive bundled 7679 GB local SSD. Network performance is anchored by a 25 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is engineered for high-density storage and database workloads. The combination of dedicated CPU resources and extensive local SSD capacity makes it highly efficient for hosting transactional databases, data warehousing, and latency-sensitive storage applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.8xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and a 7679 GB local SSD, designed for high-performance database workloads.

tagline: A dedicated processor instance featuring high-capacity local SSD storage and balanced memory for demanding database and storage-intensive workloads.
